---
id: suspend-a-customer
title: "Suspend a customer"
description: "Suspending a customer prevents access to the portal, hosted pages, and invoices. Use this endpoint only if a customer is fraudulent or presents a security risk, as this customer won't be able to re-subscribe again later."
sidebar_label: "Suspend a customer"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/proabono-api-live
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Suspend a customer"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/Customer/Suspension"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Suspending a customer prevents access to the portal, hosted pages, and invoices. Use this endpoint only if a customer is fraudulent or presents a security risk, as this customer won't be able to re-subscribe again later.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
